_note: Label Sprint round for pollen — generated pollen_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the pollen grain.

hotspots.label: Exine
hotspots.detail: The tough, patterned outer wall of the pollen grain.

hotspots.label: Intine
hotspots.detail: The thin, smooth inner wall just beneath the exine.

hotspots.label: Germ pore
hotspots.detail: A thinned area in the wall where the pollen tube will emerge.

hotspots.label: Tube cell
hotspots.detail: The larger cell that will grow into the pollen tube.

hotspots.label: Generative cell
hotspots.detail: The smaller cell nestled inside the tube cell; divides to form two sperm cells.
